title: My Chemical Romance Disc Pack
description: A data/resource pack that adds songs by My Chemical Romance in the form of music discs.
body:
# **MY CHEMICAL ROMANCE DISC PACK**
(made with [IMD Datapack generator](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zDXSKYvJXmg))
(songs exctracted with [spotify downloader](https://spotidownloader.com))
This data/resource pack adds 8 smash hits from My Chemical Romance and with plans for more on the way! (note that i do not own MCR or do i intend to make money of of this data/resource pack, this is merely a fan project. also note that some songs contain explicit language and is recommended for ages 13+)
## ALL SONGS AS OF NOW:
- Welcome To The Black Parade
- Dead [EXPLICIT]
- I Dont Love you
- Cancer
- Mama [EXPLICIT]
- Teenagers 
- Famous Last Words
- Im Not Okay (I Promise) [EXPLICIT]
